results.description: L2 module filenames must match their primary struct/trait name (with suffix tolerance)

violations.message: L2 file 'main\src\core\handler\event_emitting_handler.rs' has no struct/trait/enum definitions
violations.expected: At least one type named like 'EventEmittingHandler'
violations.fix_hint: Add a primary type 'EventEmittingHandler' or remove the file

results.description: Types in L2 modules must be name-cohesive (SRP enforcement)
Suggest Builder pattern for complex structs (advisory)

violations.message: Struct 'StageFailed' has 5 fields (0 optional) - consider Builder pattern

results.description: application_type must be defined in project metadata
mod.rs must contain only module declarations and re-exports — no struct/impl/fn logic
Sibling files sharing a common prefix must be grouped into a subdirectory module (e.g., check_runner.rs + check_result.rs → check/runner.rs + check/result.rs)
Every {implementation_layer}/ submodule must have a corresponding {interface_layer}/ submodule defining its types or traits
Every pub/pub(crate) fn in L2 layers must have an inline unit test (#[cfg(test)] block with #[test])
Each pub type/trait in api/ must be in its own standalone file with the file stem matching the snake_case name
api/ must contain error types — either a flat api/error/ subdirectory or domain-grouped api/<domain>/errors/ directories; at least one must exist
